feeds.label: 🌍 USGS Global Earthquakes (30 days, hourly)
feeds.description: Every recorded earthquake worldwide, bucketed into hourly counts. ~720 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🌊 USGS Potomac River flow (30 days, 5-min)
feeds.description: Potomac River discharge at Point of Rocks, MD. ~8,600 points at 5-min cadence. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: ₿ Bitcoin daily closes (1 year, CoinGecko)
feeds.description: BTC-USD daily close prices for the last 365 days. ~366 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🪙 Ethereum daily closes (1 year, CoinGecko)
feeds.description: ETH-USD daily close prices, last 365 days. ~366 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: ☀️ NOAA GOES X-ray flux (6 hours, 1-min)
feeds.description: GOES satellite X-ray flux at 1-min cadence, last 6 hours. ~360 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🧲 NOAA GOES magnetometer (6 hours, 1-min)
feeds.description: GOES magnetometer (Hp component) at 1-min cadence, last 6 hours. ~360 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: ⚡ NOAA GOES ≥2MeV electrons (6 hours)
feeds.description: GOES integral electron flux ≥2 MeV, last 6 hours. ~70 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🚀 NOAA GOES ≥10MeV protons (6 hours)
feeds.description: GOES integral proton flux ≥10 MeV, last 6 hours. ~570 points. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🌬️ NOAA solar wind speed (real-time, 1-min)
feeds.description: Real-time solar wind proton speed from NOAA SWPC. ~3,000 points (last 2 days at 1-min cadence). CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🧲 NOAA planetary K-index (3-hourly)
feeds.description: Planetary K index every 3 hours. ~1,000 points (last 4 months). CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 📖 Wikimedia 'Earth' pageviews (daily, 2.5 years)
feeds.description: Daily pageview counts for the Wikipedia 'Earth' article. ~920 points back to Jan 2024. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 🏦 World Bank USA GDP (annual, 65 years)
feeds.description: US GDP in current USD, annual. ~65 points back to 1960. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 💰 World Bank USA CPI (annual, 65 years)
feeds.description: US Consumer Price Index, annual. ~65 points back to 1960. CORS-open, no key.

feeds.label: 📉 World Bank USA Unemployment (annual, 35 years)
feeds.description: US unemployment rate, annual. ~35 points back to 1991. CORS-open, no key.

notes: All feeds are CORS-open (work direct from browser, no proxy needed) and require no API key. Sources match the DREAM retention page (https://dream-physics.onrender.com/retention). To add more CoinGecko coins, change the 'bitcoin' or 'ethereum' path segment. To add more World Bank indicators, change the indicator code (e.g. NY.GDP.MKTP.CD for GDP, FP.CPI.TOTL for CPI).
